headline: Connecting Toledo Neighborhoods to Opportunity — $53M, 38-block redevelopment in design
paragraphs: The federally-funded $53M project covering 38 blocks (13th–21st Street, Adams to Monroe) is in design through 2026, construction 2027–2029, completion targeted 2031. Funded by a $20M USDOT RAISE grant.
why_it_matters: Biggest neighborhood-scale infrastructure investment in this part of Toledo in a generation. Junction's 45% vacancy rate means infrastructure is going in ahead of private development — a deliberate "build it and they will come" bet.
search_terms: Connecting Toledo Neighborhoods Opportunity RAISE Uptown Junction Dorr Street design construction
